blocks.text: Each of the five daily prayers consists of a specific number of obligatory (Fard) units called Rakaat.

1. Fajr: 2 Rakaat
2. Dhuhr: 4 Rakaat
3. Asr: 4 Rakaat
4. Maghrib: 3 Rakaat
5. Isha: 4 Rakaat
In addition to Fard, the Prophet (peace be upon him) regularly performed Sunnah prayers, and the Witr prayer after Isha.
Consistently performing the Sunnah prayers helps build a house in Jannah and compensates for any shortcomings in the Fard prayers.
